BackstoryDef.title: corporate executive
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] managed a division of one of the Dominion's largest corporations, overseeing production quotas, labor allocation, and profit margins. [PAWN_pronoun] learned that the distance between a decision and its consequences is a privilege that can be purchased.

BackstoryDef.title: dominion council aide
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] served as an aide to one of the Dominion's oligarchs, managing schedules, correspondence, and the careful navigation of corporate politics. [PAWN_pronoun] learned everything about how power works and who it works for.

BackstoryDef.title: corporate lawyer
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] practiced corporate law for one of the Dominion's largest firms, defending the interests of the ruling class against the occasional inconvenience of accountability. [PAWN_pronoun] was very good at it.

BackstoryDef.title: private physician
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] practiced medicine exclusively for the upper class of a Dominion tower complex, treating conditions that most of the population would never have the luxury of surviving long enough to develop. [PAWN_pronoun] was skilled and careful and rarely thought about the floors below.

BackstoryDef.title: dominion diplomat
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] represented Dominion corporate interests in negotiations with outside factions and rival powers. [PAWN_pronoun] learned to find the exact words that advanced [PAWN_possessive] employers' interests while appearing to advance everyone else's.

BackstoryDef.title: corporate architect
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] designed the tower complexes and corporate facilities that define a Dominion city's skyline. [PAWN_pronoun] learned to think in structures and systems and developed a persistent awareness of what it costs to build them, though [PAWN_pronoun] kept that awareness quiet.

BackstoryDef.title: tower security commander
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] commanded the private security forces that protect a Dominion tower complex. [PAWN_pronoun] learned that the upper class have a very specific idea of what security means and who it is for.

BackstoryDef.title: corporate intelligence officer
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] gathered and analyzed intelligence for a Dominion corporate board, monitoring competitors, dissidents, and anyone else the board considered a threat. [PAWN_pronoun] learned that the Dominion's upper class fears very little except losing what they have.

BackstoryDef.title: dominion propagandist
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] produced the official communications and propaganda that kept the Dominion's lower classes compliant and its upper class comfortable. [PAWN_pronoun] was talented at the work and developed complicated feelings about that.

BackstoryDef.title: private military contractor
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] managed contracted military operations on behalf of Dominion corporate interests. [PAWN_pronoun] learned that war conducted for profit operates by different rules than any other kind.

BackstoryDef.title: eisengrad tower physician
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] practiced medicine on the upper floors of Eisengrad, where clean air and proper nutrition make medicine a different proposition than it is below. [PAWN_pronoun] was skilled and thorough and found [PAWN_possessive] education required significant revision when [PAWN_pronoun] encountered the world outside those floors.

BackstoryDef.title: corporate geologist
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] surveyed and assessed mineral deposits for a Dominion extraction corporation, determining which resources were worth pursuing and what it would cost to pursue them. [PAWN_pronoun] learned that cost is a concept the corporations apply selectively.

BackstoryDef.title: dominion military officer
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] served as a commissioned officer in the Dominion's corporate military, commanding units in operations that the official records described in terms [PAWN_pronoun] would not have used. [PAWN_pronoun] followed orders well and asked questions carefully.

BackstoryDef.title: corporate botanist
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] conducted plant research for a Dominion agricultural corporation, developing profitable strains of crops for the controlled growing facilities that feed the lower districts. [PAWN_pronoun] developed a genuine scientific passion that extended well beyond its commercial applications.

BackstoryDef.title: oligarch's personal guard
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] served as a personal guard to one of the Dominion's oligarchs, learning the specific violence required to keep wealthy people feeling safe. [PAWN_pronoun] learned a great deal about the upper class from that proximity and found most of it unsurprising.

BackstoryDef.title: dominion trade negotiator
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] negotiated resource and production contracts between Dominion corporations, developing a fluency in the language of corporate exchange that proved useful in contexts its original teachers never intended.

BackstoryDef.title: corporate engineer
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] designed and oversaw the construction of industrial facilities for a Dominion corporation. [PAWN_pronoun] learned the full scope of what the Dominion builds and what it takes to build it.

BackstoryDef.title: eisengrad social operator
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] navigated the complex social landscape of Eisengrad's upper class, brokering alliances, managing reputations, and occasionally destroying them. [PAWN_pronoun] learned that in the upper floors influence is the only currency that matters.

BackstoryDef.title: corporate spy
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] conducted industrial espionage for a Dominion corporate board, extracting proprietary information from competitors and managing assets inside rival organizations. [PAWN_pronoun] learned to be someone else so consistently that [PAWN_pronoun] occasionally had to remind [PAWN_objective]self who [PAWN_pronoun] was.

BackstoryDef.title: dominion relief administrator
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] administered the Dominion's official lower district relief programs, the ones designed to appear generous while changing nothing. [PAWN_pronoun] learned the precise gap between what the programs promised and what they delivered and found ways to make it slightly smaller, which nobody above [PAWN_objective] ever noticed.

BackstoryDef.title: private academy headmaster
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] ran one of the Dominion's exclusive private academies, shaping the education of the next generation of corporate leadership. [PAWN_pronoun] learned that institutions designed to produce a certain kind of person are very resistant to producing any other kind.

BackstoryDef.title: corporate surgeon
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] performed surgery for a private Dominion medical corporation, developing exceptional technical skill in a setting where the patients were wealthy and the equipment was current. [PAWN_pronoun] was precise, effective, and expensive.

BackstoryDef.title: dominion resource allocator
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] managed the allocation of resources across a Dominion corporate portfolio, determining which districts received what and in what quantities. [PAWN_pronoun] learned that allocation is another word for the distribution of consequences.

BackstoryDef.title: tower complex manager
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] managed the operations of a Dominion tower complex, overseeing everything from security to maintenance to the careful stratification of its residents by floor. [PAWN_pronoun] learned that a tower is a system and a system can be understood.

BackstoryDef.title: dominion weapons developer
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] developed weapons systems for a Dominion corporate military division, applying considerable intelligence to the problem of making violence more efficient. [PAWN_pronoun] was successful and developed a complicated relationship with that success.

BackstoryDef.title: corporate media director
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] directed the official media operations of a Dominion corporation, shaping public perception of events that the corporation preferred presented in a particular light. [PAWN_pronoun] learned that truth is a resource like any other and the corporations manage it accordingly.

BackstoryDef.title: eisengrad corporate heir
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] spent [PAWN_possessive] adult years being groomed to inherit a significant stake in one of Eisengrad's major corporate entities. [PAWN_pronoun] learned the business thoroughly and found the experience clarifying in ways [PAWN_possessive] family had not intended.

BackstoryDef.title: dominion charity director
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] ran one of the Dominion's corporate charity organizations, the ones that exist to demonstrate upper class benevolence while maintaining the conditions that make charity necessary. [PAWN_pronoun] was good at the demonstration. [PAWN_pronoun] was less certain about the rest of it.

BackstoryDef.title: private security director
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] directed the private security operations of a Dominion corporate family, managing personnel, threats, and the careful balance between visible deterrence and invisible surveillance. [PAWN_pronoun] learned that the upper class never feel as safe as they appear.

BackstoryDef.title: corporate naturalist
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] conducted wildlife research funded by a Dominion corporation, studying animal species with potential commercial applications. [PAWN_pronoun] developed a genuine scientific interest that consistently outran its corporate context.
